title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 329.033 - Duplicate license, issued when
text:
329.033.  Duplicate license, issued when. — If a license issued under this chapter has been destroyed, lost, mutilated beyond practical usage, or was never received, the licensee shall obtain a duplicate license from the board by appearing in person at the board's office or mailing, by certified mail, return receipt requested, a notarized affidavit stating that the license has been destroyed, lost, mutilated beyond practical usage, or was never received.
(L. 2018 H.B. 1500 merged with H.B. 1719)
